questions.question: Workshop mein kaam karte samay personal protective equipment (PPE) pehenna kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Kaam jaldi karne ke liye
options.C: Customer ko impress karne ke liye

questions.explanation: PPE jaise safety glasses, gloves, aur steel-toed shoes technician ko accidents aur injuries se bachate hain. Yeh workshop safety ka ek fundamental rule hai.

questions.question: Ek flat tyre ko remove karne ke liye kaun sa tool sabse pehle use kiya jayega?

options.B: Jack

questions.explanation: Lug wrench (ya wheel spanner) wheel nuts ko loose karne aur tight karne ke liye use hota hai. Tyre change karte samay yeh pehla tool hai jo nuts ko loose karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Agar kisi chemical spill ho jaye workshop floor par, toh sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Floor par 'Wet Floor' sign laga den
options.C: Appropriate absorbent material se clean karein

questions.explanation: Chemical spills ko appropriate absorbent material se clean karna chahiye taaki slippage aur chemical exposure ka risk kam ho. Water se dhona kuch chemicals ke liye dangerous ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek adjustable wrench ka primary advantage kya hai?

options.B: Yeh ek hi size ke nuts aur bolts ke liye use hota hai
options.C: Yeh alag-alag sizes ke nuts aur bolts par adjust ho sakta hai
options.D: Yeh sirf electrical work ke liye use hota hai

questions.explanation: Adjustable wrench ka naam hi batata hai ki yeh alag-alag sizes ke nuts aur bolts par adjust ho sakta hai, making it versatile for various tasks.

questions.question: Fire extinguisher ko use karne ka 'PASS' method mein 'A' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Aim at the base of the fire
options.B: Activate the extinguisher

questions.explanation: PASS ka matlab hai: P - Pull the pin, A - Aim at the base of the fire, S - Squeeze the handle, S - Sweep side to side.

questions.question: Ek multi-meter ka kya use hai auto repair mein?

options.B: Engine oil level check karna
options.C: Voltage, current aur resistance measure karna

questions.explanation: Multi-meter ek electrical testing tool hai jo voltage, current (amperes), aur resistance (ohms) ko measure karne ke liye use hota hai, jo electrical system diagnosis ke liye crucial hai.

questions.question: Jab ek vehicle ko lift par uthaya jata hai, toh safety ke liye kya karna zaroori hai?

options.A: Lift ke neeche khade ho kar check karna
options.B: Ensure ki lift arms vehicle ke designated lift points par hain

questions.explanation: Vehicle ko lift karte samay, yeh ensure karna bahut zaroori hai ki lift arms vehicle manufacturer dwara specify kiye gaye lift points par properly placed hon taaki vehicle stable rahe aur damage na ho.

questions.question: Torque wrench ka primary purpose kya hai?

options.B: Specific torque value par fasteners ko tight karna

questions.explanation: Torque wrench ka use fasteners (jaise nuts aur bolts) ko ek exact, pre-set torque value tak tight karne ke liye hota hai. Yeh over-tightening ya under-tightening se bachata hai, jo component failure ka cause ban sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'creeper' ka workshop mein kya use hai?

options.B: Vehicle ke neeche asani se slide karke kaam karna

questions.explanation: Creeper ek wheeled board hota hai jo technician ko vehicle ke neeche let kar asani se slide karne aur kaam karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Compressed air gun use karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Hamesha safety glasses pehenna

questions.explanation: Compressed air gun se debris aur particles high speed par nikal sakte hain, jo aankhon ko serious injury pahuncha sakte hain. Isliye hamesha safety glasses pehenna mandatory hai.

questions.question: Electrical fire ko bujhane ke liye kaun sa fire extinguisher suitable hai?

options.B: Foam-based extinguisher
options.C: CO2 (Carbon Dioxide) or Dry Chemical (ABC) extinguisher

questions.explanation: Electrical fires (Class C) ke liye CO2 ya Dry Chemical (ABC) extinguishers use kiye jaate hain kyunki yeh non-conductive hote hain aur electrical shock ka risk nahi hota. Water-based extinguishers electrical fires ke liye extremely dangerous hote hain.

questions.question: Ek technician ko electrical system par kaam karne se pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Battery ke negative terminal ko disconnect karna

questions.explanation: Electrical system par kaam karte samay accidental short circuits aur electrical shock se bachne ke liye battery ke negative (ground) terminal ko disconnect karna ek essential safety precaution hai.

questions.question: Hydraulic jack use karte samay, vehicle ko lift karne ke baad kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Jack par hi vehicle ko chod den
options.B: Safety stands (jack stands) ka use karein
options.C: Tyre ko jaldi se remove karein

questions.explanation: Hydraulic jacks sirf lifting ke liye hote hain, support ke liye nahi. Vehicle ko jack par support karna dangerous ho sakta hai. Hamesha safety stands ka use karein jab vehicle ko lifted position mein support karna ho.

questions.question: Oil spill ko clean karte samay kaun sa material sabse effective hoga?

options.B: Sawdust (lakdi ka burada)

questions.explanation: Absorbent granules ya kitty litter oil spills ko effectively soak kar lete hain, floor ko non-slippery banate hain aur disposal bhi asan ho jata hai.

questions.question: Ek vehicle ke engine compartment mein loose connection check karte samay, kaun sa tool sabse useful hoga?

options.B: Pliers

questions.explanation: Engine compartment mein aksar chhote screws aur clamps hote hain. Screwdriver set alag-alag type ke screws ko tight karne ya loose karne ke liye essential hai.

questions.question: Jab ek vehicle ko road test ke liye le jaate hain, toh kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Customer ke saman ko car mein hi rehne den
options.C: Vehicle ki registration aur insurance papers check karein

questions.explanation: Road test par jaane se pehle vehicle ke legal documents jaise registration aur insurance papers ki validity check karna zaroori hai. Iske alawa, seat belt pehenna aur traffic rules follow karna bhi important hai.

questions.question: Workshop mein 'Good Housekeeping' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Tools aur equipment ko unki jagah par rakhna aur workspace ko neat & tidy rakhna

questions.explanation: Good housekeeping mein na sirf floor ko saaf rakhna shamil hai, balki tools ko organize karna, equipment ko maintain karna, aur overall workspace ko safe aur efficient banana bhi shamil hai.

questions.question: Engine mein piston ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Air filter karna
options.C: Combustion se generate hui force ko crankshaft tak transmit karna

questions.explanation: Piston cylinders ke andar upar-neeche move karta hai aur fuel-air mixture ke combustion se generate hui force ko connecting rod ke through crankshaft tak transmit karta hai, jisse rotary motion milti hai.

questions.question: Engine oil ka kya main purpose hai?

options.B: Engine parts ko lubricate karna aur friction kam karna

questions.explanation: Engine oil moving parts ke beech friction ko kam karta hai, wear aur tear ko rokta hai, aur engine ko cool rakhne mein bhi help karta hai.

questions.question: Radiator ka kya role hai car ke cooling system mein?

options.B: Coolant ko thanda karna

questions.explanation: Radiator engine se garam coolant ko receive karta hai aur usse air ke through thanda karta hai, taaki engine operating temperature par maintain rahe.

questions.question: Spark plug ka kya kaam hai petrol engine mein?

options.B: Air supply karna
options.C: Fuel-air mixture ko ignite karne ke liye spark provide karna

questions.explanation: Spark plug high voltage electrical current ko spark mein convert karta hai, jo cylinder ke andar compressed fuel-air mixture ko ignite karta hai, jisse combustion hota hai.

questions.question: Diesel engine aur Petrol engine mein main difference kya hai fuel ignition ke method mein?

options.A: Diesel engine spark plug use karta hai
options.B: Petrol engine compression ignition use karta hai
options.C: Diesel engine fuel ko high compression heat se ignite karta hai
options.D: Petrol engine sirf air use karta hai

questions.explanation: Petrol engine spark plug se fuel-air mixture ko ignite karta hai (spark ignition). Diesel engine mein, air ko itna compress kiya jata hai ki uska temperature itna high ho jata hai ki inject kiya gaya diesel fuel apne aap ignite ho jata hai (compression ignition).

questions.question: Engine block kis material se bana hota hai?

options.B: Rubber

questions.explanation: Engine block high strength aur heat dissipation properties ke liye cast iron ya aluminum alloy se banaya jata hai. Aluminum blocks lightweight hone ke karan zyada common ho rahe hain.

questions.question: Timing belt/chain ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Crankshaft aur camshaft ko synchronize karna
options.C: Power steering pump ko drive karna

questions.explanation: Timing belt/chain crankshaft aur camshaft ko synchronize karta hai, jisse engine valves sahi samay par open aur close hote hain, combustion process ko optimize karte hue.

questions.question: Exhaust manifold ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: Fresh air engine mein supply karna
options.B: Engine se nikli exhaust gases ko collect karke exhaust system tak bhejna

questions.explanation: Exhaust manifold engine cylinders se nikli hot exhaust gases ko collect karta hai aur unhe exhaust pipe aur muffler system mein guide karta hai.

questions.question: Oil filter ko regular intervals par change karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Engine ko garam rakhne ke liye
options.B: Engine oil se impurities aur contaminants ko remove karne ke liye
options.D: Tyre ki life badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Oil filter engine oil se dust particles, metal shavings aur carbon deposits jaise impurities ko remove karta hai, jisse clean oil engine parts ko lubricate karta hai aur engine ki life badhti hai.

questions.question: Thermostat ka cooling system mein kya role hai?

options.B: Engine operating temperature ko regulate karna

questions.explanation: Thermostat engine aur radiator ke beech coolant flow ko control karta hai. Yeh engine ko jaldi warm-up hone deta hai aur fir coolant ko radiator mein circulate karke engine ko optimum operating temperature par maintain karta hai.

questions.question: Valve train mein valves ka kya function hai?

options.B: Fuel ko store karna
options.C: Air aur exhaust gases ko cylinder mein enter aur exit karne dena

questions.explanation: Valves (intake aur exhaust) cylinder mein fuel-air mixture (intake) ke entry aur burnt exhaust gases (exhaust) ke exit ko control karte hain.

questions.question: Agar car ka coolant level kam ho jaye, toh kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Engine overheating ho sakta hai
options.D: Tyre pressure kam ho sakta hai

questions.explanation: Coolant engine ki heat ko absorb karke radiator tak le jata hai. Agar coolant level kam ho, toh engine ki heat properly dissipate nahi ho payegi, jisse engine overheating ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Turbocharger ka main advantage kya hai?

options.B: Engine ki power aur efficiency badhana by forcing more air into the engine

questions.explanation: Turbocharger exhaust gases ki energy ka use karke ek turbine ko drive karta hai, jo ek compressor ko chalata hai. Yeh compressor engine mein zyada air force karta hai, jisse combustion better hota hai aur engine ki power output aur efficiency badhti hai.

questions.question: Crankshaft position sensor (CKP) ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Crankshaft ki rotational speed aur position ko detect karna

questions.explanation: CKP sensor crankshaft ki exact position aur speed ko ECU (Engine Control Unit) ko batata hai. Is information ka use ECU ignition timing aur fuel injection timing ko calculate karne ke liye karta hai.

questions.question: Engine mein 'blow-by' gases kya hoti hain?

options.A: Fresh air jo engine mein enter karti hai
options.B: Combustion gases jo piston rings ke paas se crankcase mein leak ho jaati hain
options.C: Exhaust gases jo muffler se nikalti hain
options.D: Fuel vapors jo fuel tank se nikalti hain

questions.explanation: Blow-by gases combustion chamber se leak hui exhaust gases hoti hain jo piston rings ke through crankcase mein chali jaati hain. Inhe PCV (Positive Crankcase Ventilation) system ke through engine mein wapas recycle kiya jata hai.

questions.question: Air filter ka kya use hai?

options.B: Fuel ko filter karna
options.C: Engine mein jaane wali air se dust aur impurities remove karna

questions.explanation: Air filter engine mein enter hone wali air se dust, pollen aur anya airborne particles ko remove karta hai, jisse engine components ko wear aur tear se bachaya ja sake.

questions.question: Water pump ka engine mein kya function hai?

options.B: Engine oil ko pump karna
options.C: Coolant ko engine aur radiator ke beech circulate karna
options.D: Windshield washer fluid ko pump karna

questions.explanation: Water pump cooling system ka ek vital component hai jo coolant ko engine ke andar aur radiator ke through circulate karta hai, taaki heat ko effectively dissipate kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Car battery ka primary function kya hai?

options.B: Engine ko start karne ke liye electrical power provide karna

questions.explanation: Car battery starter motor ko power supply karti hai taaki engine start ho sake. Yeh engine off hone par bhi electrical components ko power deti hai.

questions.question: Alternator ka kya kaam hai car mein?

options.B: Battery ko charge karna aur electrical system ko power supply karna jab engine chal raha ho

questions.explanation: Alternator engine ki mechanical energy ko electrical energy mein convert karta hai. Yeh battery ko charge karta hai aur car ke electrical components (lights, radio, etc.) ko power deta hai jab engine chal raha hota hai.

questions.question: Fuse box ka kya purpose hai car ke electrical system mein?

options.B: Electrical circuits ko short circuit aur overcurrent se protect karna

questions.explanation: Fuses electrical circuits ko excessive current se bachate hain. Agar current limit se zyada ho jaye, toh fuse blow ho jata hai aur circuit open ho jata hai, jisse components damage hone se bach jaate hain.

questions.question: Headlights dim hone ka common reason kya ho sakta hai?

options.B: Weak battery ya faulty alternator

questions.explanation: Dim headlights usually insufficient electrical power supply ka sign hain, jo weak battery (jo charge hold nahi kar pa rahi) ya faulty alternator (jo battery ko charge nahi kar pa raha) ke karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Car horn bajane par agar woh kaam na kare, toh sabse pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Horn ka fuse

questions.explanation: Horn ek electrical component hai, aur agar woh kaam nahi kar raha toh sabse pehle uska fuse check karna chahiye. Agar fuse blow ho gaya hai, toh usse replace karna problem solve kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Starter motor ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Engine ko rotate karke start karna

questions.explanation: Starter motor ek electrical motor hai jo battery power ka use karke engine ke flywheel ko rotate karta hai, jisse engine crank hota hai aur start ho pata hai.

questions.question: Wiring harness ka kya role hai car mein?

options.B: Electrical wires ko organize aur protect karna

questions.explanation: Wiring harness ek organized bundle hota hai electrical wires ka jo car ke alag-alag electrical components ko connect karta hai, unhe damage se bachata hai aur installation ko simplify karta hai.

questions.question: Agar car ki battery disconnect ho jaye, toh kya ho sakta hai?

options.A: Engine aur electrical systems kaam karna band kar denge
options.B: Tyre pressure badh jayega

questions.explanation: Battery car ke electrical systems aur engine ko power supply karti hai. Agar yeh disconnect ho jaye, toh car start nahi hogi aur koi bhi electrical component kaam nahi karega.

questions.question: Ignition coil ka kya function hai?

options.A: Low voltage current ko high voltage current mein convert karna spark plug ke liye
options.B: Fuel ko ignite karna

questions.explanation: Ignition coil battery se aane wale low voltage current ko spark plugs ko fire karne ke liye zaroori high voltage current mein boost karta hai.

questions.question: Dashboard par 'battery light' on hone ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Battery charge nahi ho rahi hai ya charging system mein problem hai
options.D: Battery ka temperature bahut high hai

questions.explanation: Battery light indicate karta hai ki charging system (alternator, voltage regulator, wiring) mein koi problem hai aur battery properly charge nahi ho rahi hai.

questions.question: Ek LED (Light Emitting Diode) headlight ka main benefit kya hai halogen headlight ke comparison mein?

options.B: Zyada energy efficient aur lambi life hoti hai
options.D: Sirf fog mein kaam karti hai

questions.explanation: LED headlights halogen bulbs se zyada energy efficient hoti hain, zyada bright light provide karti hain, aur unki operational life bhi significantly lambi hoti hai.

questions.question: CAN bus system ka kya role hai modern cars mein?

options.B: Electronic control units (ECUs) ke beech data communication ko allow karna

questions.explanation: CAN (Controller Area Network) bus ek communication protocol hai jo car ke alag-alag ECUs (engine, transmission, ABS, airbags, etc.) ko ek dusre se communicate karne ki permission deta hai, jisse wiring complexity kam hoti hai aur reliability badhti hai.

questions.question: Ek resistor ka electrical circuit mein kya function hai?

options.B: Current flow ko regulate ya restrict karna

questions.explanation: Resistor current flow ko restrict karta hai aur voltage drop produce karta hai. Yeh electrical components ko protect karne aur circuits mein desired current aur voltage levels maintain karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Agar car start na ho aur 'click click' sound aaye, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Low battery charge ya faulty starter motor

questions.explanation: Clicking sound usually low battery charge ka indication hota hai, jisme starter solenoid engage hone ki koshish karta hai lekin battery mein enough power nahi hoti starter motor ko turn karne ke liye. Faulty starter motor bhi iska karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Bulb replacement karte samay, kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Naye bulb ko nange haathon se pakadna
options.B: Engine ko chalte rehne dena
options.C: Ignition off karna aur circuit ko disconnect karna

questions.explanation: Bulb replacement karte samay electrical shock se bachne ke liye aur short circuit ko avoid karne ke liye ignition off karna aur battery ke negative terminal ko disconnect karna ek safe practice hai.

questions.question: Relay ka kya use hai car ke electrical system mein?

options.B: Ek small current se high current circuit ko control karna

questions.explanation: Relay ek electromagnetic switch hota hai jo ek low-current signal ka use karke high-current circuit ko switch on ya off karta hai. Yeh high-current components jaise headlights, starter motor, fuel pump, etc., ko control karne mein help karta hai.

questions.question: Voltage regulator ka kya function hai?

options.B: Alternator se aane wale voltage ko regulate karna taaki battery overcharge na ho

questions.explanation: Voltage regulator alternator se aane wale voltage ko ek constant level par maintain karta hai (usually around 13.5-14.5 volts) taaki battery overcharge na ho aur car ke electrical components ko stable power supply mile.

questions.question: Tyre pressure ko maintain karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Engine ki power badhane ke liye
options.B: Fuel efficiency, safety aur tyre ki life badhane ke liye
options.C: Car ko fast drive karne ke liye
options.D: AC ko better chalane ke liye

questions.explanation: Correct tyre pressure maintain karne se fuel efficiency improve hoti hai, tyre ka wear evenly hota hai, aur vehicle ki handling aur braking performance better hoti hai, jisse overall safety badhti hai.

questions.question: Brake fluid ka kya kaam hai braking system mein?

options.B: Brake pedal se generate hui force ko wheels tak transmit karna

questions.explanation: Brake fluid ek hydraulic fluid hai jo brake pedal par lagayi gayi force ko brake calipers/wheel cylinders tak transmit karta hai, jisse brake pads/shoes engage hote hain aur vehicle slow down ya stop hota hai.

questions.question: ABS (Anti-lock Braking System) ka main benefit kya hai?

options.B: Emergency braking ke dauran wheels ko lock hone se rokna, jisse steering control bana rahe
options.D: Brake fluid ka level monitor karna

questions.explanation: ABS emergency braking ke dauran wheels ko lock hone se rokta hai, jisse driver ko steering control maintain karne mein help milti hai aur vehicle skidding se bach jata hai.

questions.question: Suspension system ka kya function hai?

options.B: Road shocks aur vibrations ko absorb karna aur ride comfort provide karna

questions.explanation: Suspension system vehicle aur uske occupants ko road irregularities se hone wale shocks aur vibrations se insulate karta hai, jisse ride comfortable rehti hai aur vehicle ka road par grip bana rehta hai.

questions.question: Agar car chalate samay steering wheel vibrate kare, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Unbalanced wheels ya faulty suspension components

questions.explanation: Steering wheel vibration unbalanced wheels, bent rims, worn out suspension components (jaise ball joints, tie rod ends) ya faulty brake rotors ke karan ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Tyre rotation kyun kiya jata hai?

options.A: Tyre ko naya banane ke liye
options.B: Tyre wear ko evenly distribute karne aur tyre ki life badhane ke liye
options.C: Tyre ko inflate karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Tyre rotation se sabhi tyres par wear evenly distribute hota hai, kyunki front aur rear tyres alag-alag tareeke se wear hote hain. Isse tyre ki overall life badhti hai.

questions.question: Power steering system ka kya advantage hai?

options.B: Steering wheel ko turn karna asan banana

questions.explanation: Power steering system driver ke effort ko kam karta hai, steering wheel ko turn karna asan banata hai, especially low speeds par ya parking karte samay.

questions.question: Disc brake system mein brake pads ka kya role hai?

options.B: Rotor (disc) par friction apply karke vehicle ko slow down karna

questions.explanation: Brake pads calipers ke andar hote hain. Jab brake pedal press kiya jata hai, toh pads rotor par clamp ho kar friction create karte hain, jisse wheel ki rotation speed kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Wheel alignment kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Engine ki power badhane ke liye
options.B: Tyre wear ko optimize karne, steering control aur handling ko improve karne ke liye
options.C: Fuel tank ko clean rakhne ke liye
options.D: AC ko better chalane ke liye

questions.explanation: Proper wheel alignment se tyre wear evenly hota hai, vehicle straight drive karta hai, aur steering response better hota hai, jisse overall driving experience aur safety improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Shock absorbers ka kya kaam hai suspension system mein?

options.B: Springs ke oscillations ko dampen karna

questions.explanation: Shock absorbers suspension springs ke upar-neeche hone wale movements (oscillations) ko control karte hain, jisse vehicle bounce nahi karta aur ride smooth rehti hai.

questions.question: Agar brake pedal spongy feel kare, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Air in the brake lines ya low brake fluid

questions.explanation: Spongy brake pedal ka matlab hai ki brake lines mein air aa gayi hai ya brake fluid level kam hai. Air compressible hoti hai, isliye pedal ko spongy feel karati hai. Brake fluid leak bhi iska karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Tyre tread depth ko measure karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Tyre ka color check karne ke liye
options.B: Tyre ki grip aur safety check karne ke liye, especially wet conditions mein
options.C: Tyre ki manufacturing date check karne ke liye
options.D: Tyre pressure check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Adequate tread depth wet roads par water ko channel out karne aur grip maintain karne ke liye crucial hai. Kam tread depth se hydroplaning ka risk badhta hai aur braking performance kam hoti hai.

questions.question: Power steering fluid ka kya role hai?

options.B: Power steering pump ko lubricate karna aur hydraulic pressure transmit karna

questions.explanation: Power steering fluid hydraulic pressure generate karta hai jo steering rack ya gearbox ko assist karta hai, jisse steering effort kam hota hai. Yeh pump aur anya components ko lubricate bhi karta hai.

questions.question: Drum brakes mein 'shoe' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Drum ke inner surface par friction apply karna

questions.explanation: Drum brake system mein, brake shoes brake lining ke saath drum ke inner surface par press hote hain, friction create karte hain aur wheel ki rotation ko slow down karte hain.

questions.question: Caster, Camber aur Toe kya hain?

options.B: Suspension system ke parts

questions.explanation: Caster, Camber aur Toe wheel alignment ke teen primary angles hain jo vehicle ki steering, handling aur tyre wear ko affect karte hain. Inhe proper settings par adjust karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Tyre sidewall par 'P195/65R15' marking mein 'R' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Racing tyre

questions.explanation: Tyre sidewall marking mein 'R' Radial construction ko denote karta hai, jo modern passenger car tyres mein sabse common construction type hai. '15' rim diameter inch mein hai.

questions.question: Ball joint ka suspension system mein kya role hai?

options.B: Suspension components ko connect karna aur wheels ko move karne dena while allowing steering

questions.explanation: Ball joints control arms ko steering knuckles se connect karte hain. Yeh wheels ko upar-neeche move karne aur steering ke liye pivot point provide karte hain.

questions.question: Clutch ka kya function hai manual transmission wali car mein?

options.B: Engine aur transmission ke beech power flow ko engage aur disengage karna

questions.explanation: Clutch engine ki rotary motion ko transmission se disconnect karta hai, jisse gears change karna possible hota hai aur smooth start aur stop provide karta hai.

questions.question: Gearbox (transmission) ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Engine ki speed aur torque ko wheels tak transmit karne ke liye adjust karna

questions.explanation: Gearbox engine ki power ko wheels tak transmit karte samay engine ki speed aur torque ko adjust karta hai, jisse vehicle alag-alag speeds aur loads par efficiently move kar sake.

questions.question: Drive shaft ka kya function hai rear-wheel drive car mein?

options.B: Transmission se differential tak power transmit karna

questions.explanation: Drive shaft (ya propeller shaft) transmission se power ko rear axle ke differential tak transmit karta hai, jo fir wheels ko drive karta hai.

questions.question: Differential ka kya role hai car mein?

options.B: Wheels ko alag-alag speeds par rotate karne dena while turning

questions.explanation: Differential ek mechanical component hai jo wheels ko alag-alag speeds par rotate karne deta hai, jo corners ya turns lete samay zaroori hai. Yeh torque ko wheels par distribute bhi karta hai.

questions.question: Automatic transmission mein 'torque converter' ka kya function hai?

options.B: Engine ki power ko transmission tak fluid ke through transmit karna

questions.explanation: Torque converter automatic transmission mein clutch ka kaam karta hai. Yeh engine ki power ko hydraulic fluid ke through transmission tak transmit karta hai, jisse smooth gear changes aur vehicle ka movement hota hai.

questions.question: Agar clutch pedal 'slip' kare, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Worn-out clutch disc ya pressure plate

questions.explanation: Clutch slip tab hota hai jab clutch disc aur flywheel ke beech friction kam ho jata hai, usually worn-out clutch components ke karan. Isse engine RPM badhta hai lekin vehicle ki speed proportionaly nahi badhti.

questions.question: CV joint (Constant Velocity Joint) ka kya use hai front-wheel drive cars mein?

options.B: Power ko transmission se wheels tak transmit karna, allowing for suspension travel aur steering angles

questions.explanation: CV joints drive shafts ke ends par hote hain aur wheels ko power transmit karte hain, even jab suspension travel karta hai aur wheels turn karte hain, without velocity changes.

questions.question: Gear oil ya transmission fluid ko regular intervals par change karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Engine ki power badhane ke liye
options.B: Transmission components ko lubricate aur cool rakhne ke liye
options.C: Tyre ki life badhane ke liye
options.D: AC ko better chalane ke liye

questions.explanation: Gear oil transmission ke gears aur bearings ko lubricate karta hai, friction aur heat ko kam karta hai. Regular change se transmission ki life badhti hai aur smooth shifting maintain rehti hai.

questions.question: Flywheel ka kya kaam hai engine aur clutch ke beech?

options.B: Engine ki rotational inertia ko smooth karna aur clutch disc ke liye friction surface provide karna

questions.explanation: Flywheel engine ki crankshaft se attached hota hai aur uski rotational inertia ko smooth karta hai. Yeh clutch disc ke liye ek friction surface bhi provide karta hai jisse power transmission hoti hai.

questions.question: Transaxle kya hai?

options.B: Transmission aur differential ka combined unit, commonly used in front-wheel drive cars

questions.explanation: Transaxle ek single unit mein transmission aur differential ko combine karta hai. Yeh front-wheel drive vehicles mein space aur weight bachane ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Agar manual transmission mein gears shift karne mein mushkil ho, toh kya problem ho sakti hai?

options.B: Low transmission fluid, faulty clutch ya worn synchronizers

questions.explanation: Difficult gear shifting low transmission fluid level, worn clutch components (pressure plate, disc), ya transmission ke andar worn synchronizers ke karan ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Propeller shaft mein universal joints (U-joints) ka kya purpose hai?

options.B: Power ko angles par transmit karna

questions.explanation: Universal joints propeller shaft ko alag-alag angles par power transmit karne ki permission dete hain, jo suspension travel aur vehicle ki movement ke karan hota hai.

questions.question: AWD (All-Wheel Drive) system ka kya advantage hai?

options.B: Improved traction aur handling in various road conditions

questions.explanation: AWD system sabhi four wheels par power distribute karta hai, jisse snow, mud, ya loose gravel jaise challenging conditions mein traction aur stability significantly improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Clutch release bearing (throw-out bearing) ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Clutch fork se pressure plate tak force transmit karna

questions.explanation: Clutch release bearing clutch fork se pressure plate ke diaphragm spring tak force transmit karta hai, jisse pressure plate release hoti hai aur clutch disengage hota hai.

questions.question: Traction control system ka kya function hai?

options.B: Wheel spin ko detect karna aur engine power ya braking ko adjust karke traction maintain karna

questions.explanation: Traction control system sensors ka use karke wheel spin ko detect karta hai. Agar koi wheel spin ho raha ho, toh yeh engine power ko kam karta hai ya us wheel par brake apply karta hai taaki grip maintain rahe aur stability badhe.

questions.question: Limited-slip differential (LSD) ka kya benefit hai?

options.B: Power ko dono drive wheels par distribute karna, even if one wheel loses traction

questions.explanation: Standard differential power ko us wheel par bhejta hai jismein least resistance ho (jo slip kar raha ho). LSD is problem ko solve karta hai by ensuring ki power dono drive wheels par jaye, jisse traction improve hoti hai, especially slippery conditions mein.

questions.question: Engine oil change karte samay kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.B: Sahi type aur quantity ka oil use karna
options.C: Oil filter ko change na karna
options.D: Purane oil ko gutter mein phenk dena

questions.explanation: Sahi type aur quantity ka engine oil use karna engine ki proper lubrication aur performance ke liye crucial hai. Purane oil ko hamesha responsibly dispose karna chahiye.

questions.question: Service karte samay air filter ko check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Tyre pressure check karne ke liye
options.B: Engine mein clean air supply ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Brake fluid level check karne ke liye
options.D: Engine oil level check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Clean air filter engine ko dust aur debris se bachata hai, proper combustion ensure karta hai aur fuel efficiency maintain karta hai. Clogged filter se engine performance kam ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Brake pad replacement karte samay, brake calipers ko compress karne ke liye kaun sa tool use hota hai?

options.B: Hammer
options.C: C-clamp ya specialized brake piston compressor tool

questions.explanation: Brake pads change karte samay, naye pads ko fit karne ke liye caliper piston ko compress karna hota hai. Iske liye C-clamp ya ek specialized brake piston compressor tool use hota hai.

questions.question: Tyre pressure check karte samay, kab check karna sabse best hai?

options.B: Jab tyre thanda ho (cold tyre pressure)

questions.explanation: Tyre pressure hamesha 'cold' check karna chahiye, yaani jab vehicle kam se kam teen ghante se khada ho ya ek mile se kam drive kiya ho. Garam hone par pressure badh jata hai, jisse inaccurate reading milti hai.

questions.question: Coolant level check karte samay, kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Radiator cap ko garam engine par kholna
options.B: Hamesha thande engine par check karna

questions.explanation: Garam engine par radiator cap kholne se pressurized hot coolant bahar nikal sakta hai, jisse serious burns ho sakte hain. Hamesha engine ko thanda hone ka intezaar karein.

questions.question: Spark plugs ko replace karte samay, unka gap check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Spark plug ka size check karne ke liye
options.B: Optimal ignition aur engine performance ke liye
options.C: Spark plug ka color check karne ke liye
options.D: Spark plug ki manufacturing date check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Spark plug gap correct hona chahiye taaki ignition system se optimal spark generate ho. Incorrect gap se misfires, rough idle, aur poor fuel economy ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Battery terminals par white powdery substance kya indicate karta hai?

options.B: Battery corrosion, jo poor connection ka karan ban sakta hai
options.C: Battery ka temperature bahut low hai

questions.explanation: White powdery substance battery terminals par corrosion hota hai, jo battery acid ke vapors aur metals ke beech reaction se banta hai. Yeh electrical connection ko impede karta hai.

questions.question: Windshield wiper blades ko kab replace karna chahiye?

options.B: Jab woh streaking, skipping ya squeaking karein

questions.explanation: Wiper blades ko replace karna chahiye jab woh effective tarike se windshield ko clean na kar paayein, streaking, skipping ya squeaking ki awaaz karein, ya rubber damage ho jaye.

questions.question: Fuel filter ko replace karna kyun important hai?

options.A: Engine oil ko clean rakhne ke liye
options.B: Engine mein clean fuel supply ensure karne ke liye
options.C: Brake fluid ko clean rakhne ke liye
options.D: Tyre ki life badhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Fuel filter fuel se dirt, rust aur anya contaminants ko remove karta hai. Clogged fuel filter se engine performance kam ho sakti hai, fuel pump par load badh sakta hai, aur fuel injectors damage ho sakte hain.

questions.question: Serpentine belt (drive belt) ko check karte samay kya dekhna chahiye?

options.B: Cracks, fraying, ya missing ribs

questions.explanation: Serpentine belt engine accessories (alternator, AC compressor, power steering pump, water pump) ko drive karta hai. Cracks, fraying ya missing ribs uske wear ka sign hain aur usse replace karna chahiye.

questions.question: Brake fluid change karte samay, 'bleeding the brakes' kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Brake pads ko lubricate karne ke liye
options.B: Brake lines se air ko nikalne ke liye
options.C: Brake fluid level adjust karne ke liye
options.D: Brake pedal ko stiff banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Brake lines mein air ki presence brake pedal ko spongy bana sakti hai aur braking efficiency ko kam kar sakti hai. Bleeding process air ko brake system se nikalta hai, jisse firm pedal feel aur effective braking restore hoti hai.

questions.question: Wheel bearing ki failure ka ek common symptom kya hai?

options.B: Vehicle speed ke saath badhta hua humming ya grinding noise
options.D: Steering wheel vibration during braking only

questions.explanation: Faulty wheel bearing aksar vehicle speed ke saath badhti hui humming, growling ya grinding noise produce karta hai. Yeh noise cornering karte samay badh ya kam ho sakti hai.

questions.question: Cabin air filter ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Car ke cabin mein aane wali air se dust, pollen aur pollutants ko filter karna

questions.explanation: Cabin air filter vehicle ke interior mein aane wali air se dust, pollen, soot aur anya airborne particles ko remove karta hai, jisse occupants ke liye breathable air quality improve hoti hai.

questions.question: Worn-out spark plugs ke kya symptoms ho sakte hain?

options.B: Engine misfires, rough idle, poor acceleration aur reduced fuel economy

questions.explanation: Worn spark plugs inefficient combustion ka karan bante hain, jisse engine misfires karta hai, idle rough ho jata hai, acceleration kam hoti hai aur fuel economy bhi kharab ho jati hai.

questions.question: Battery test karte samay, voltage aur CCA (Cold Cranking Amps) check karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Battery ka size check karne ke liye
options.B: Battery ki overall health aur engine start karne ki capacity check karne ke liye
options.C: Battery ka color check karne ke liye
options.D: Battery ka weight check karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Voltage battery ka charge level batata hai, jabki CCA rating batati hai ki battery cold temperatures mein engine ko kitni power de sakti hai. Dono battery ki health aur performance ke liye crucial indicators hain.

questions.question: Tyre repair (puncture) karte samay, kya precaution leni chahiye?

options.A: Tyre ko inflate hi rehne den
options.B: Tyre ko vehicle se remove karke proper repair karna, not just a temporary plug

questions.explanation: Proper tyre repair mein tyre ko wheel se remove karna, puncture ko inspect karna, andar se patch lagana aur fir tyre ko remount aur rebalance karna shamil hai. Temporary plugs sirf emergency ke liye hote hain aur long-term solution nahi hain.
